description: A maintenance technician needs to perform a lockout-tagout procedure to safely de-energize a piece of equipment before working on it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the specific LOTO procedure for the equipment being serviced.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct procedure, which identifies all energy sources (electrical, pneumatic, etc.).

nodes.task_description: Follow the procedure to isolate and lock all energy sources.

expected_outcome.value: The technician physically applies locks and tags to all required isolation points.

nodes.task_description: Log the LOTO application in the electronic system, recording the lock numbers and the start time of the work.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new entry in the LOTO log.
